name: claws
description: Turn every VS Code terminal into a programmable endpoint. List, create, send, execute, read, and close terminals from any external process via a local socket.

scripts.compile: npm run schemas && tsc --noEmit && node esbuild.mjs
scripts.build: npm run schemas && node esbuild.mjs --production && node scripts/bundle-native.mjs

commands.title: Uninstall Cleanup (remove Claws files from workspaces)

claws.socketPath.description: Relative path (from workspace root) for the Unix socket. Default: .claws/claws.sock

claws.logDirectory.description: Relative path for wrapped terminal pty logs. Default: .claws/terminals

claws.defaultWrapped.description: Create all new terminals as wrapped (with pty logging) by default.

claws.maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum bytes of output buffered per command event (256KB default).

claws.maxHistory.description: Maximum command events retained in the ring buffer.

claws.maxCaptureBytes.description: Maximum per-terminal output captured in the in-memory ring buffer for wrapped Pseudoterminal terminals (1 MB default).

claws.execTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout for an `exec` command before the server rejects with timeout (milliseconds, 180s default). Individual requests may override via `timeoutMs` in the request payload.

claws.pollLimit.description: Maximum number of history events returned by a single `poll` request. Responses exceeding this are truncated to the most-recent `limit` entries and include `truncated: true`.

claws.enableWebSocket.description: [Planned] Enable WebSocket server for cross-device access.

claws.strictEventValidation.description: When true, the server rejects publish requests that fail envelope or payload schema validation. When false (default), validation failures emit system.malformed.received but the event is still fanned out.

claws.heartbeatIntervalMs.description: Milliseconds between automatic system.heartbeat events emitted by the server. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 60000 ms (1 minute).

claws.auth.enabled.description: [L18 AUTH] When true, hello requests must include a valid HMAC-SHA256 token. Requires claws.auth.tokenPath to be set.

claws.auth.tokenPath.description: [L18 AUTH] Path to the shared secret file used for HMAC-SHA256 token validation. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace root.

claws.webSocket.enabled.description: [L19 TRANSPORT-X] When true, a WebSocket server is started alongside the Unix socket transport. Requires the 'ws' npm package to be installed.

claws.webSocket.port.description: [L19 TRANSPORT-X] TCP port for the WebSocket server. Default: 5678.

claws.webSocket.certPath.description: [L19 TRANSPORT-X] Absolute path to TLS certificate file. When set (with keyPath), the server uses wss:// instead of ws://.

claws.webSocket.keyPath.description: [L19 TRANSPORT-X] Absolute path to TLS private key file. When set (with certPath), the server uses wss:// instead of ws://.
